title: OutputValidationException Class for MapReduce Output Committer
description: The `OutputValidationException.java` file defines a custom exception class, `OutputValidationException`, used in Hadoop MapReduce's output committer. This class extends `PathIOException` to signal validation errors during the output phase of a MapReduce job. It has two constructors: one for initializing with a Path and error message, and another for including a cause of the exception. The class imports `org.apache.hadoop.fs.Path` and `org.apache.hadoop.fs.PathIOException`, indicating its role within the Hadoop MapReduce output committer. It's part of the package `org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.lib.output.committer.manifest.impl`, showing its collaboration with other committer-related classes.

raw_response:
TITLE: OutputValidationException Class for MapReduce Output Committer

DESCRIPTION: 
The `OutputValidationException.java` file defines a custom exception class, `OutputValidationException`, used in Hadoop MapReduce's output committer. This class extends `PathIOException` to signal validation errors during the output phase of a MapReduce job. It has two constructors: one for initializing with a Path and error message, and another for including a cause of the exception. The class imports `org.apache.hadoop.fs.Path` and `org.apache.hadoop.fs.PathIOException`, indicating its role within the Hadoop MapReduce output committer. It's part of the package `org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.lib.output.committer.manifest.impl`, showing its collaboration with other committer-related classes.
